strategy: Hit with Myth; he takes +50% and resists Storm 80%.
He hits hard and often: Leviathan (1,135) at the end of every Round except the fourth, and Stormzilla (775-835) every second Round. Keep shields and heals flowing.
Race him down fast; the incoming Storm damage adds up, so minimize setup Rounds.
Stack a couple of Myth blades and Feint, then end quickly with one Myth hit.
cheatNotes: He Leviathans a random wizard for 1,135 at the end of every Round except the fourth; expect heavy Storm damage almost every turn and shield up.
Every second Round he adds a 775-835 Stormzilla; between this and Leviathan, keep heals ready and end the fight quickly.
